column4: A disciplined lane-holder who punishes straight corridors and elite pushes.
A plague architect built for curse spread and attrition setups.
A brutal impact tower that deletes clustered mid-lane pressure.
A short-range bruiser tower for choke points and panic clears.
A precision tower for long corridors and priority elimination.
A chain-lightning tyrant who scales with dense routing.
A stable overclock tower that trades flair for relentless uptime.
A rapid-fire tower for leak cleanup and tempo stabilization.
A trick-shot disruptor that turns side lanes into ricochet traps.
A loyal brawler tower that loves short maps and front-line pressure.
A stealth execution tower that specializes in hidden threats and elites.
A volatility tower that floods the board with chaotic bounce pressure.
A toxin stacker for long fights and boss-chip setups.
A frost attrition tower that slows routes and stretches kill windows.
A greed-focused siege tower that rewards efficient wave farming.
An endurance tower made to salvage ugly waves and survive attrition.
